title: Extra Cheesy Argentinian Pasta Lasagna
description: A rich and comforting Argentinian-inspired lasagna featuring a creamy pasta-water-emulsion and a blend of melted cheeses.
instructions: Cook the lasagna noodles according to the package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, sauté the chopped onion and minced garlic in butter until softened.
Add the ground beef to the skillet and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1-2 minutes. Then, add the diced tomatoes and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
In a separate saucepan, combine the vegetable stock and bechamel sauce. Bring to a simmer over medium heat and cook until heated through.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked lasagna noodles, the meat sauce, and the bechamel sauce. Mix well to combine.
In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, create a layer of the pasta mixture. Top with a layer of shredded mozzarella cheese and a sprinkle of parmesan cheese.
Repeat the layering process two more times, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 10-15 minutes before serving.
